title: Stronger Potions
description: Adds a stronger and a longer Potion variant for all Potions
body:
# Stronger Potions
This Mod adds a stronger version and a longer version of Vanilla Potions but only if they have a long or a strong variant. The Potion duration and amplifiers are based off the already existing potions. The Potions should be balanced but there will maybe be changes in the future.
## Brewing Recipes
### Stronger Potion Recipe
The stronger Potion variant can be brewed with the strong variant of the potion that you want to make stronger and a Glowstone Block.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![glowstone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb5b0c57105acd12ee21d2be85e4dcc4ac5d59e0.png)

</details>


### Longer Potion Recipe
The longer Potion variant can be brewed with the long variant of the potion that you want to make last longer and a Redstone Block.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![redstone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41e1f448e004ee0c027779dc0d390af08622ee54.png)

</details>
